bookSourceComment:
修改：1、优化验证代码，加快验证速度；by：xiaohan231-2025/10/08
修改：1、增加账号轮询；2、发现增加分类标签缓存；by：xiaohan231-2025/07/20
修改：1、修复封面图片；2、修复音频链接；by：xiaohan231-2025/05/30
修改：1、增加正文限制弹窗验证；by：xiaohan231-2025/05/04
修改：1、增加清除网站Cookie缓存按钮；2、增加清除远程代码标识按钮；3、优化缓存锁；by：xiaohan231-2025/04/26
修改：1、部分源代码改为远程获取；by：xiaohan231-2025/04/03
修改：1、优化查看当前信息；2、增加筛选词条功能；by：xiaohan231-2025/03/08
修改：1、优化章节链接；2、查看当前增加显示当前登录账号；by：xiaohan231-2025/03/07
新增：1、新增UAA有声；by：xiaohan231-2025/03/06
loginUi:
[
  { name: "账号：", type: "text" },
  { name: "密码：", type: "password" },
  {
    name: "💡登录账号💡",
    type: "button",
    action: "Login()",
    style: {layout_flexGrow: 1, layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45}
  },
  {
    name: "💡源站更新💡",
    type: "button",
    action: "update()",
    style: {layout_flexGrow: 1, layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45}
  },

  { name: "查看当前", type: "button", action: "look(0)", style: {layout_flexGrow: 1, layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.25} },
  { name: "查看历史", type: "button", action: "look(1)", style: {layout_flexGrow: 1, layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.25} },
  { name: "恢复默认", type: "button", action: "test(0)", style: {layout_flexGrow: 1, layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.25} },

  { name: "༺ˇ»`ʚ  填写作品评分  ɞ´«ˇ༻", type: "button", action: "login('【评论上传】' + n(2) + '评分填写1-5后保存\\n\\n🔶刷新详情后填写评论🔶')", style: {layout_flexGrow: 1, layout_flexBasisPercent: 1}},
  { name: "评分：", type: "text" },

  { name: "༺ˇ»`ʚ  填写筛选词条  ɞ´«ˇ༻", type: "button", action: "login('【筛选词条】' + n(2) + '填写分类、标签、屏蔽的词条\\n\\n多个词条用逗号隔开\\n\\n🔶搜索增加分类、标签、屏蔽🔶\\n\\n%%后接分类词条\\n\\n@@后接标签词条\\n\\n##后接屏蔽词条')", style: {layout_flexGrow: 1, layout_flexBasisPercent: 1}},
  { name: "分类：", type: "text" },
  { name: "标签：", type: "text" },
  { name: "屏蔽：", type: "text" },

  { name: "༺ˇ»`ʚ  点击切换源站  ɞ´«ˇ༻", type: "button", style: {layout_flexGrow: 1, layout_flexBasisPercent: 1} },
  { name: "①UAA①", type: "button", action: "$(1)", style: {layout_flexGrow: 1, layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.25} },
  { name: "②UAA②", type: "button", action: "$(2)", style: {layout_flexGrow: 1, layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.25} },
  { name: "③UAA③", type: "button", action: "$(3)", style: {layout_flexGrow: 1, layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.25} },

  { name: "༺ˇ»`ʚ  点击切换进度  ɞ´«ˇ༻", type: "button", style: {layout_flexGrow: 1, layout_flexBasisPercent: 1} },
  { name: "全部", type: "button", action: "o(0)", style: {layout_flexGrow: 1, layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.25} },
  { name: "完结", type: "button", action: "o(1)", style: {layout_flexGrow: 1, layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.25} },
  { name: "连载", type: "button", action: "o(2)", style: {layout_flexGrow: 1, layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.25} },

  { name: "༺ˇ»`ʚ  点击切换来源  ɞ´«ˇ༻", type: "button", style: {layout_flexGrow: 1, layout_flexBasisPercent: 1} },
  { name: "全部", type: "button", action: "q(0)", style: {layout_flexGrow: 1, layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.25} },
  { name: "原创首发", type: "button", action: "q(1)", style: {layout_flexGrow: 1, layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.25} },
  { name: "会员上传", type: "button", action: "q(2)", style: {layout_flexGrow: 1, layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.25} },

  { name: "༺ˇ»`ʚ  点击切换排序  ɞ´«ˇ༻", type: "button", style: {layout_flexGrow: 1, layout_flexBasisPercent: 1} },
  { name: "默认", type: "button", action: "r(0)", style: {layout_flexGrow: 1, layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.25} },
  { name: "上架", type: "button", action: "r(1)", style: {layout_flexGrow: 1, layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.25} },
  { name: "更新", type: "button", action: "r(2)", style: {layout_flexGrow: 1, layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.25} },
  { name: "观看", type: "button", action: "r(3)", style: {layout_flexGrow: 1, layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.25} },
  { name: "收藏", type: "button", action: "r(4)", style: {layout_flexGrow: 1, layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.25} },
  { name: "评分", type: "button", action: "r(5)", style: {layout_flexGrow: 1, layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.25} },

  { name: "༺ˇ»`ʚ  点击切换取向  ɞ´«ˇ༻", type: "button", style: {layout_flexGrow: 1, layout_flexBasisPercent: 1} },
  { name: "全部", type: "button", action: "u(0)", style: {layout_flexGrow: 1, layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.25} },
  { name: "男主", type: "button", action: "u(1)", style: {layout_flexGrow: 1, layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.25} },
  { name: "女主", type: "button", action: "u(2)", style: {layout_flexGrow: 1, layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.25} },
  { name: "男男", type: "button", action: "u(3)", style: {layout_flexGrow: 1, layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.25} },
  { name: "女女", type: "button", action: "u(4)", style: {layout_flexGrow: 1, layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.25} },
  { name: "", type: "button", style: {layout_flexGrow: 1, layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.25} },

  { name: "༺ˇ»`ʚ  点击切换日期  ɞ´«ˇ༻", type: "button", style: {layout_flexGrow: 1, layout_flexBasisPercent: 1} },
  { name: "全部", type: "button", action: "v(0)", style: {layout_flexGrow: 1, layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.2} },
  { name: "今日", type: "button", action: "v(1)", style: {layout_flexGrow: 1, layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.2} },
  { name: "本周 ", type: "button", action: "v(2)", style: {layout_flexGrow: 1, layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.2} },
  { name: "本月", type: "button", action: "v(3)", style: {layout_flexGrow: 1, layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.2} },

  { name: "༺ˇ»`ʚ  点击切换评分  ɞ´«ˇ༻", type: "button", style: {layout_flexGrow: 1, layout_flexBasisPercent: 1} },
  { name: "全部", type: "button", action: "w(0)", style: {layout_flexGrow: 1, layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.15} },
  { name: ">1", type: "button", action: "w(1)", style: {layout_flexGrow: 1, layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.15} },
  { name: ">2", type: "button", action: "w(2)", style: {layout_flexGrow: 1, layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.15} },
  { name: ">3", type: "button", action: "w(3)", style: {layout_flexGrow: 1, layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.15} },
  { name: ">4", type: "button", action: "w(4)", style: {layout_flexGrow: 1, layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.15} },

  { name: "༺ˇ»`ʚ  点击评论排序  ɞ´«ˇ༻", type: "button", style: {layout_flexGrow: 1, layout_flexBasisPercent: 1} },
  { name: "最新", type: "button", action: "a(1)", style: {layout_flexGrow: 1, layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45} },
  { name: "热门", type: "button", action: "a(2)", style: {layout_flexGrow: 1, layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45} },

  { name: "页数：", type: "text" },

  {
    name: "清除网站Cookie缓存",
    type: "button",
    action: "deleteCookie()",
    style: {layout_flexGrow: 1, layout_flexBasisPercent: 1}
  },

  { name: "清除远程代码标识", type: "button", action: "DeleteYckey()", style: {layout_flexGrow: 1, layout_flexBasisPercent: 1} },

  {
    name: "💡　　 源　　 站　　 打　　 印　　 💡",
    type: "button",
    action: "test()",
    style: {layout_flexGrow: 1, layout_flexBasisPercent: 1}
  }
]

ruleBookInfo.author: $.authors
ruleBookInfo.init:
<js>
cache.delete('uaatoclock');
var BUrl = String(/http/.test(baseUrl) ? baseUrl : `${java.hexDecodeToString(result)}`);
book.bookUrl = `data:;base64,${java.base64Encode(BUrl)},{"type":"uaabook"}`;
var viewId = cache.get("uaaId") || '17412391340638566';
result = java.ajax(BUrl.replace(/=viewId/,'=' + viewId));
java.setContent(result);
result;
</js>
$.model
ruleBookInfo.name: $.title

ruleSearch.author: $.authors

ruleToc.nextTocUrl:
<js>
var a = 'http://mobile.ximalaya.com/fmobile-album/album/track/ts-1576706285548?ac=4G&albumId=@get:{book}&device=android&isAsc=true&isQueryInvitationBrand=true&isVideoAsc=true&pageSize=200&source=3&supportWebp=true&pageId=';
var r = [];
for(var i=1;i<40;i++){
    r.push(a + parseInt(i*1));
}
r
</js>

<js>
headers={
    "User-Agent": "Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/127.0.0.0 Safari/537.36 Edg/127.0.0.0",
    "Cookie": cache.get(java.md5Encode16(Get('url') + "ck")) || "csrftoken=48O7Z6UO0ArRSYHuuzPxvEbBbPl9tlQqPtCNs5AOHjIHtoehwmfIKgNOFes1tAmy",
    "x-csrftoken": cache.get(java.md5Encode16(Get('url') + "csrf-token")) || "lMsCCm6JzFqks7IgA7GTvIgf1gBIAO9N67gi5lMJgoHa3xf3CU64KkSsvFIAA3FV"
};
cache.put(java.md5Encode16(Get('url') + "headers"),JSON.stringify(headers));
JSON.stringify(headers);
</js>
